_comment: Hand-curated FIXTURE_OPS method extensions for VeSyncIntegrationVirtual.groovy.
Each entry lists driver-side methods that are NOT documented in pyvesync's vendored
tests/api/.../<fixture>.yaml — typically v2.3+ command additions to this fork's drivers
that pyvesync's upstream test fixtures haven't been updated to cover.
The regenerator at tools/regenerate_virtual_parent.py merges these into the
auto-generated FIXTURE_OPS @Field block, deduping by method name (extensions take
When a pyvesync upstream PR adds these methods to the canonical fixture YAML,
remove the corresponding extension entry here; the next regenerator run will
replace it with the canonical pyvesync source.
